return(function(I,H,q,z,E,o,D,i,y,L,B,a,K,A,v,g,d,e,Y,l,N,R)g,B,N,l,A,e,i,K,v,y,L,d,Y,a,R={},function()y=y+(-589375+589376)i[y]=-368776+368777 return y end,function(I,p)local H=l(p)local
